    "Online": 1,
    "SecuritiesAccount": 0,

}

      "Family": 2,
      "Education": null,
      "Mortgage": null,
      "CDAccount": null,

      "Education",
      "Mortgage",
      "CDAccount",
      "Online",
      "SecuritiesAccount"

}
